overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a walk through Saint Denis. The player moves from a garden courtyard with a large oak tree, up a stone staircase, through a plaza with a suffragette protester, and into a park with palm trees and an equestrian statue. The setting is a historic New Orleans-inspired city with overcast skies.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a garden courtyard with cobblestone paths and flower beds. A large oak tree dominates the center while a historic mansion stands to the left. The player walks forward through this semi-covered space toward a stone staircase.

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a wide stone staircase between historic brick buildings. The space is narrow and enclosed with mostly blocked sky. A man in a suit stands at the top of the stairs as the camera climbs upward.

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a wide plaza with paved ground and scattered pedestrians. A suffragette stands prominently with a protest sign advocating for women's voting rights. Men sit on benches nearby as the camera approaches the woman, triggering a game interaction prompt.

segments.scene_description: The player walks past the suffragette into a park area with dense palm trees and gravel paths. A large equestrian statue becomes visible in the distance as the camera moves forward through the landscaped garden.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a secluded garden courtyard into a bustling public plaza and finally into a landscaped city park. It begins by walking through a cobblestone courtyard dominated by a large oak tree and a historic mansion before approaching a set of stone stairs. As the camera ascends the wide staircase, the environment becomes narrow and enclosed by brick buildings, leading upward toward a man in a suit. The scene then opens into a wide, paved plaza where the camera moves past pedestrians and a suffragette holding a protest sign. Finally, the path shifts from the open plaza into a park area filled with dense palm trees and gravel walkways, moving toward a large equestrian statue in the distance.
